segments: : مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْفَرِیضَهِ سُورَهَ الْمُدَّثِّرِ کَانَ حَقّاً عَلَی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ یَجْعَلَهُ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فِی دَرَجَتِهِ وَ لَا یُدْرِکُهُ فِی حَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا شَقَاءٌ أَبَداً إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
arabic.text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْفَرِیضَهِ سُورَهَ الْمُدَّثِّرِ کَانَ حَقّاً عَلَی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ یَجْعَلَهُ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فِی دَرَجَتِهِ وَ لَا یُدْرِکُهُ فِی حَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا شَقَاءٌ أَبَداً إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Muddassir in his obligatory Salaat it is the duty of Allah to give him a status along with Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and he will not face any difficulty in his worldly life, God-Willing.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Muddassir in his obligatory Salaat it is the duty of Allah to give him a status along with Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and he will not face any difficulty in his worldly life, God-Willing.”

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْخَیَّاطِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدٍ الْبَاقِرِ ع قَالَ
